prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约9792→8553→8309→9626→9509名，整体呈先升后降再趋稳的波动走势。2022–2023年位次明显前移（从9792升至8309） ，2024年大幅后移至9626，2025年小幅回调至9509，近两年在9500–9600区间震荡，2025年基准位次约9509名；该校在黑龙江省理科（物理类）招生计划2021年6 0人、2022年58人、2023年59人、2024年59人、2025年57人，2026年计划57人，与2025年持平。计划总量近年呈小幅缩减趋势（从60降至57），2026年维持不变，对竞争格 局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国药科大学是211工程、国家双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第88位（2025年第86位、2024年第102位），排名近年稳中有升，处于全 国百强中游水平，在医药类院校中位居前列；2025年高考周期内该校出现师德师风相关舆情（教师被指性骚扰学生），评价为偏负面，可能对报考心理产生一定 抑制；2026年周期内无新增显著声誉事件，影响趋于消退。抖音热度总排名第90位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现高热关注信号；药学为A+学科 （全国顶尖），中药学相关学科实力突出，在教育部第五轮学科评估中药学获评A+，是该校核心竞争优势，对有志于医药方向的考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学类、 中药学类等核心专业社会热度持续较高，医药行业就业前景稳定；黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数约167000人（2025年物理类+历史类合计约172114人），按近年物理类占比约68% 估算，2026年物理类考生约113900人，较2025年物理类117407人减少约3%，考生规模小幅缩减，竞争压力略有缓解；中国 药科大学位于江苏省南京市，属东部发达地区，对东北考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在黑龙江省招生占比约2.2%（2025年13人/全国598人），占比稳定，非主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9509名、2026年招生计划持平、黑龙江省物理类考生总数小幅减少（竞争略缓）、学校声誉影响趋于消退、药学A+学科持续吸引优质生源等因素，预 计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移。预测最低位次约9479名，区间8979–9979名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 9792 → 8553 → 8309 → 9626 → 9509, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising, then falling, and then stabilizing. Rankings moved significantly forward from 2022 to 2023 (from 9792 to 8309), then dropped sharply to 9626 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 9509 in 2025. In the past two years, rankings have oscillated around the 9500–9600 range, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 9509. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Heilongjiang Province was 60 students in 2021, 58 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 57 in 2025. The plan for 2026 is 57 students, unchanged from 2025. The total enrollment has shown a slight decreasing trend (from 60 to 57), with no change in 2026, which has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Pharmaceutical University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings was 88th in 2026 (86th in 2025, 102nd in 2024), showing a stable upward trend and placing it in the mid-range of the national top 100, leading among pharmaceutical institutions. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced negative public opinion related to teacher ethics (a teacher was accused of sexually harassing students), which was evaluated as somewhat negative and may have suppressed some applicants' enthusiasm. In the 2026 cycle, there were no new significant reputation events, and the impact is fading. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 90th, evaluated as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no high-attention signals. Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and traditional Chinese pharmacy-related disciplines are notably strong. In the fifth round of the Ministry of Education's discipline evaluation, traditional Chinese pharmacy was rated A+, which is a core competitive advantage of the university, strongly attracting candidates interested in medicine and pharmacy.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as pharmacy and traditional Chinese pharmacy continue to have high social popularity, with stable employment prospects in the pharmaceutical industry. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province general college entrance examination is approximately 167,000 (compared to about 172,114 for physics and history categories combined in 2025). Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 68%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 113,900, a decrease of about 3% from 117,407 in 2025, indicating a slight reduction in candidate scale and a slight easing of competitive pressure. China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, in the developed eastern region, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to candidates from Northeast China. The university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province is about 2.2% (13 students out of 598 nationally in 2025), which is stable and not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 9509 in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in the total number of physics category candidates in Heilongjiang Province (slightly easing competition), the fading impact of the university's reputation, and the continued attraction of high-quality students due to the A+ pharmacy discipline, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly higher than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9479, with a range of 8979–9979.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class)
- Traditional Chinese Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class)
- Biopharmaceuticals (Top Innovation Class)
- Clinical Pharmacy (Excellent Pharmacist Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Pharmacy Category (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Pharmaceutical Chemistry)
- Biopharmaceuticals
- Traditional Chinese Pharmacy Category (Traditional Chinese Pharmacy, Traditional Chinese Medicine Resources and Development, Traditional Chinese Pharmaceutical Preparations)
- Biotechnology
- Biomedical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category (Pharmaceutical Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health, Environmental Science)
- Biomedical Data Science
- Pharmaceutical Economics and Management
- Biostatistics
- Cosmetic Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (8979–9979), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 top innovation classes as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 9000), you can aim for top programs like Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class); if your ranking is near the upper limit (about 10000), it is advisable to prioritize core majors in Tier 2 such as Pharmacy Category and Traditional Chinese Pharmacy Category to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科（历史类）最低位次依次约1331→1611→1264→1582→1866名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021年1331名，2022年后移至1611，2023年回升至1264，2024 年再后移至1582，2025年进一步后移至1866，近3年累计后移约602名，下行趋势明显，2025年基准位次约1866名；该校在黑龙江省文科（历史类）招生计划2021 年2人、2022年4人、2023年3人、2024年3人、2025年4人，2026年计划6人，较2025年扩招2人（增幅50%）。扩招幅度较大，将显著增加录取机会，推动位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国药科大学是211工程、国家双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第88位，在全国百强中游水平，以药学为特色，文科专业非其核心优势；202 5年高考周期内该校出现师德师风相关舆情，评价偏负面；2026年周期内无新增显著声誉事件。抖音热度总排名第90位，评价为一般，曝光量中等；药学A+为核 心优势，但文科招生专业（经济管理试验班、英语）与药学一级学科关联度较低，学科评估优势对文科专业报考的直接拉动作用有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 经济管理试验班（ 医药方向）和英语（医药方向）属交叉应用型专业，社会热度平稳；黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数约167000人，按近年历史类占比约32%估算，2026年历史类考生约53100人，较 2025年历史类54707人减少约3%，考生规模小幅缩减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1866名、2026年招生计划扩招50%（从4人增至6 人）这一关键利好、历史类考生总数小幅减少、学校声誉影响有限等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年明显后移。预测最低位次约2446名，区间2006–2886名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1331 → 1611 → 1264 → 1582 → 1866, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2021, the ranking was 1331; in 2022, it moved back to 1611; in 2023, it rebounded to 1264; in 2024, it moved back again to 1582; and in 2025, it further moved back to 1866. Over the past three years, the cumulative backward movement is about 602 positions, indicating a clear downward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1866. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Heilongjiang Province was 2 students in 2021, 4 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 3 in 2024, and 4 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 6 students, an increase of 2 students (50% increase) compared to 2025. The relatively large expansion will significantly increase admission opportunities and push the ranking further back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Pharmaceutical University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 88th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, at the mid-level of the national top 100. It is characterized by pharmacy, and its liberal arts majors are not its core strengths. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced negative public opinion related to teacher ethics and style, with a somewhat negative evaluation. In the 2026 cycle, there were no new significant reputation events. Its overall popularity on Douyin ranks 90th, with average evaluation and medium exposure. Pharmacy (A+) is its core advantage, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Economic Management Experimental Class, English) have low correlation with the pharmacy first-level discipline. The direct pulling effect of discipline evaluation advantages on liberal arts major applications is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) and English (Pharmaceutical Direction) are cross-disciplinary applied majors with stable social popularity. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is approximately 167,000. Based on the recent history category proportion of about 32%, the estimated number of history category candidates in 2026 is about 53,100, a decrease of about 3% from 54,707 in 2025, indicating a slight reduction in candidate scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 1866 in 2025, the key positive factor of a 50% enrollment expansion in 2026 (from 4 to 6 students), the slight decrease in the total number of history category candidates, and the limited impact of the university's reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move back compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2446, with a range of 2006–2886.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) (includes Business Administration, Health Service and Management, Medical Product Management)
- English (Pharmaceutical Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- None currently.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are only two enrollment majors in liberal arts. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (2006–2886) have opportunities. Those with rankings near the lower limit of the range (around 2000) can prioritize the Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction); those with rankings near the upper limit (around 2900) are advised to choose English (Pharmaceutical Direction) as a safe option. Both majors are in the pharmaceutical cross-disciplinary direction, with employment prospects related to the pharmaceutical industry.
